context: Tests whether the response provides a working PostgreSQL connection pool setup with essential configuration.

checklist.name: Uses pg Pool
checklist.description: Uses the pg (node-postgres) Pool class or another established PostgreSQL client library

checklist.name: Configures pool size
checklist.description: Sets max connections or pool size parameter

checklist.name: Configures timeouts
checklist.description: Sets connection timeout, idle timeout, or both

checklist.name: Includes error handling
checklist.description: Shows error handling on the pool (pool.on('error') or try/catch around queries)

checklist.name: Shows query usage pattern
checklist.description: Demonstrates how to acquire a client and run a query using the pool (pool.query or pool.connect)

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Code is syntactically valid and configuration options are real pg Pool options
